name: Lumbar Woven Grid Pillow Neutral/Navy/Tan - Threshold designed with Studio McGee
description:
Upgrade the look of your bedroom or living space with this Lumbar Woven Grid Pillow from Threshold designed with Studio McGee. Made from 100% cotton with soft filling, this rectangular throw pillow is adorned with a woven grid pattern in neutral, navy and tan hues for an instant style upgrade. Whether you're lounging in your fave recliner, reading a book on the couch or watching TV curled up on your sofa, you'll love leaning on this versatile oblong pillow.

Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee: Looks like home, feels like you.
